posts.author: HeNotMedicated
posts.title: Do not negotiate with Canada. They have worked Internationally to undermine and hamper the Trump Administration. Slap 10% Tariff on Canadians for their ANTI-AMERICAN sentiments and let the next President negotiate with them in 2 years.

posts.raw_content:
He wants you to pray to Him so that He will answer your prayer in a shocking way. God tells us in Jeremiah 33:3, “Call unto me, and I will answer you, and show you great and mighty things, which you know not.” 

God created us in Christ Jesus, washed our sins away and wants to continue living His life on earth THROUGH YOU. He wants to fulfill the great and mighty things He has planned to do through you. 

God wants you to do that. He Himself will be doing everything through you. “For it is God which works in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure” (Philippians 2:13) 
As you read God’s Word and learn to meditate in Him, God will then be able to reveal things to you by His Spirit living in you. Prayer is the most important aspects of our Christian life.

This is why you must be born-again. After we have been born of the Spirit, prayer is the act by which the people of God become incorporated into the presence and action of God in the world. It is God who actually prays through us. He gives to every believer what the Bible calls “an unction.”  “But you have an unction from the Holy One, and you know all things.” (1 John 2:20) Prayer becomes a sacrificial offering of ourselves to God to become agents of God's presence and action in the daily events and situations of our lives.

READ GOD’S WORD, THEN MEDITATE UPON GOD’S WORD – THAT IS WHEN THE SPIRIT OF GOD BEGINS TO SPEAK TO YOU, SHOWING YOU THE GREAT AND MIGHTY THINGS HE CREATED YOU FOR

Biblical meditation focuses on filling your mind with God's word rather than emptying it. Key verses to reflect upon include Psalm 1:2, “But his delight is in the law of the Lord; and in his law does he meditate day and night.”(meditating day and night yields fruit), 

Psalm 19:14, “Let the words of my mouth, and the meditation of my heart, be acceptable in thy sight, O Lord, my strength, and my redeemer. (making the meditation of your heart acceptable to God)”

Joshua 1:8, “This book of the law shall not depart out of your mouth; but you shall meditate therein day and night, that you may observe to do according to all that is written therein: for then you shall make your way prosperous, and then you shall have good success.” (meditating on the law for success). 

MEDITATE:  Biblical meditation is the intentional practice of deeply reflecting on and internalizing God’s Word. Biblical meditation is about actively filling your mind with Scripture, pondering its meaning, and applying it to your daily life.

posts.author: Jonnywalker
posts.title: Alt Left senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed Wants Medicare for All ‘From Cradle to Grave.’ His Psychiatrist Wife Doesn’t Accept Medicare—or Any Insurance at All.

link_metadata.description: Left-wing Michigan Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed supports universal health care through a single-payer "Medicare for All" system that would cover every American "from cradle to grave." His wife, psychiatrist Sarah Jukaku, does not take Medicare or any other insurance plan, forcing her patients to pay out of pocket for the services they receive. She also appears to have scrubbed a portion of the "Frequently Asked Questions" page on her website making clear that she does not accept insurance.
link_metadata.title: Abdul El-Sayed Wants Medicare for All ‘From Cradle to Grave.’ His Psychiatrist Wife Doesn’t Accept Medicare—or Any Insurance at All.
